metadata.description: A coordinated set of Claude Code plugins — session telemetry, workflow helpers, and curated skills.

plugins.name: session-stats
plugins.description: Token usage, cost, runtime, and per-model breakdown for the current Claude Code session.

plugins.name: autonomo
plugins.description: Autonomously turn a freeform task description into a PR by running the superpowers pipeline (brainstorm → plan → execute → PR) without user interaction.
